name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Orlando's Western Union Money Order Only at 30 N Summerlin Ave offers convenient check-cashing and money order services in the heart of downtown.
description_long:
Located at 30 N Summerlin Ave in downtown Orlando, FL, Western Union Money Order Only is a standalone check-cashing store providing essential financial services to the local community. The Orlando location operates with extended Saturday hours, staying open 24 hours on Saturdays to accommodate customers who need money order and check-cashing services when other businesses are closed.

This Orlando branch offers money order services, check cashing, and related financial solutions. Customers can contact the location at +1 407-423-2912 to ask about current offerings, rates, and any questions about sending money or cashing checks.

For Orlando residents needing quick, reliable money order services, this location is a convenient option near downtown. Bring a valid government-issued ID to complete your transaction. Western Union Money Order Only specializes in fast, straightforward financial services for customers across Florida.
pros: Extensive network of 1,850+ agent locations across US, including major retailers like Walmart and grocery chains
Money orders available as trusted alternative to checks at participating locations
Online registration option to save time at counter—start transfer online, pay in cash in-store
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, debit card, and credit card at select locations
MTCN tracking system allows both sender and recipient to monitor fund status in real-time
International money transfers with automatic conversion to recipient's local currency
Bill payment services available (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
No minimum balance or credit check required for prepaid Visa card option
cons: In-person transactions require visiting physical agent locations—no option for purely digital completion
Pricing varies between online and in-person methods; website does not transparently display fee structures for money order or in-person services
No currency exchange services at physical locations—exchanges only occur at time of international transfer
Service availability and hours depend on individual agent location, creating inconsistent accessibility
Money order cashing at banks may require deposit account rather than immediate cash access
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without checking accounts needing to send/receive cash quickly
People sending money internationally who need fast, reliable service with minimal setup
Customers in retail-heavy areas (Walmart, grocery stores) seeking convenient in-person bill payment
Individuals needing money orders as check alternatives for secure fund transfers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers, immigrants, and people needing quick in-person cash transfers or money orders without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is that all services require visiting physical locations, and transparent fee information is unavailable on their website—customers must visit locations or use their cost calculator to understand actual charges.
services: Domestic in-person money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with currency conversion
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments)
Cash pickup for funds sent by others using MTCN
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card (no minimum balance/credit check)
Online or app-based transfer registration for in-store payment
Bank partner money transfer services at select financial institutions
Retail location services (Walmart, grocery chains) for accessible money transfers
MTCN tracking system for fund monitoring
Mobile app for transfer initiation and location finding
Money transfer cost calculator for rate comparison
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 30 N Summerlin Ave, Orlando, FL. Open 24 hours on Saturdays with check-cashing and money order services.
